---
title: ImmPort
alias: &ALIAS immport
href: https://www.immport.org/
listing:
  id: pubs
  template: ../../../../_ejs/publications-people.ejs 
  contents: 
    - "../../../../publications/**/*.qmd"
    - "!../../../../publications/_template/"
  sort: "pub_number desc"
  include:
    categories: *ALIAS
  fields: [publication, title, categories, image, date, author]

---

## Overview

ImmPort is a NIAID-funded data repository and analysis platform providing immunology data sharing and reuse to accelerate translational research and clinical trials.

## Key Features

- Archives immunological datasets from NIAID-funded studies including clinical trials and basic research
- Supports diverse data types: flow cytometry, gene expression, serology, and clinical metadata
- Provides standardized data templates and ontologies for consistent immunology data reporting
- Offers interactive analysis tools and programmatic API access for data reuse
- Enables linking of experimental immunology data across studies for meta-analysis

## Use Cases in Research

- Accessing immunological response data from vaccine and infectious disease clinical trials
- Mining immune cell phenotyping data to characterize responses to specific pathogens
- Integrating ImmPort datasets with genomic and transcriptomic data for systems immunology
- Building training datasets for AI models predicting immune response to infection or vaccination
- Identifying immune correlates of protection relevant to AMR infection outcomes

## Getting Started

Visit [ImmPort](https://www.immport.org/) to access the database.

## Related Publications

:::{#pubs}
:::
